visuals.title: Image Degradation and Restoration Process
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Image Degradation and Restoration Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="blur">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Image Degradation and Restoration Model</text>
  
  <!-- Original Image -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="80" height="80" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Original Image
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Degradation Process -->
  <path d="M130 100 L170 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="170,100 165,97 165,103" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Degraded Image -->
  <rect x="180" y="60" width="80" height="80" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" filter="url(#blur)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Degraded Image
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Restoration Process -->
  <path d="M260 100 L300 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="300,100 295,97 295,103" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Restored Image -->
  <rect x="310" y="60" width="80" height="80" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Restored Image
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Degradation Factors -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Noise
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="190" y="180" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Blur
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="330" y="180" width="60" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="360" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ...
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Restoration Methods -->
  <rect x="50" y="250" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Filtering
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="190" y="250" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Deconvolution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="330" y="250" width="60" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="360" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ...
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting arrows -->
  <path d="M110 140 L110 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M250 140 L250 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M350 140 L350 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <path d="M110 220 L110 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M250 220 L250 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M350 220 L350 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
